data.body: Epic review round4: PASS, blocking=0, advisory=2 (P5 shared-file ordering, P6 AC worked-examples), attestation SIGNED @sha 22827a7. Justification for residual advisories: P5 fully addressed via depends_on edges (0435->a41f,b55f; 6755->9d81; f088->9d81; b5a4->e866,235a) + single-agent linear relation-chain where dependency order==stack order==total order (observable in-session proxy = git stack linearity); every shared file edited by one change at a time built on prior. P6: ACs are already codebase-verifiable checklist items with concrete failure examples (e.g. session-log-missing-append caught by CI); adding worked examples to every line is diminishing returns for docs remediation. Proceeding to claim epic.
